title: sclarea candidissima
intro: Sclarea candidissima, also known as white clary sage, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of white clary sage include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving menstrual cramps and PMS symptoms, and promoting better sleep. The herbal preparations of white clary sage include essential oil, which is often used in aromatherapy, and tea, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
